targets.name: Pete (@innov8or)
targets.business: personizer.net — solo founder, day job + startup

targets.name: Ian (@ianymu1021)
targets.business: Adot Community — AI accountability matching for founders
targets.signal: Analyzed 20k posts, found accountability is #1 founder complaint. Building a solution to the exact problem you solve. Potential referral partner OR client who needs his own execution rhythm.

targets.business: Founder Accountability Partners — matching platform. SEO Executive in Surat.
targets.signal: Admits to '10 half-built projects collecting digital dust' and 'lost all motivation after week 3.' Building an accountability product but exhibiting the exact execution-stall pattern himself.

targets.signal: Actively seeking weekly 30-60 min accountability calls. Wants to discuss 'wins, losses, aha moments.' Has startup experience. No system in place.

targets.name: Janice

targets.name: andygcook

targets.name: gczh

targets.name: Freya Padmore
targets.business: Squarespace web designer, DIY Website Club membership, now also working 9-5 at Hookflash
targets.signal: Severe burnout (May + August). Financial stress from business investments. Social media coaching investment that didn't work. Took a 9-5 because business couldn't sustain. Fears judgment. Monthly check-ins for 2026.
targets.outreach_channel: Email via website contact or social

targets.name: Aspen (CEO, Northern Primrose)
targets.business: Northern Primrose — hired 11, kept 4. 650+ meeting hours. Scaling without structure.
targets.signal: Publicly admitted to hiring too fast without systems. 'Momentum will always tempt you to move faster than your systems can handle.' Prioritizing structure for 2026. Needs an operating rhythm.
targets.outreach_channel: Email — specificity angle referencing their blog post

targets.name: Davey
targets.business: New project, between jobs

targets.name: goutham8

targets.name: RebeccaGaskell
